summary: All 6 critical launch fixes verified successfully. Backend tests: 19/19 passed. UI tests: Share link displays correctly with all transaction details, money precision, and status badges.

minor.issue: 500 error seen in logs - likely due to old transactions missing 'created_at' field (Pydantic validation error)
minor.note: Only affects listing old/corrupted transactions, not new ones

passed_tests: ✅ FIX 1 - SHARE LINK: /t/:shareCode route opens correctly for logged-out users
✅ FIX 1 - SHARE LINK: /api/share/{shareCode} endpoint is public (no auth required)
✅ FIX 1 - SHARE LINK: Returns 404 for invalid codes, 200 with TransactionPreview for valid codes
✅ FIX 1 - SHARE LINK: UI displays all transaction details (item, price, fee, parties, status)
✅ FIX 2 - EMAIL: EMAIL_ATTEMPT logging present in send_email()
✅ FIX 2 - EMAIL: EMAIL_SKIPPED logging for invalid/empty email addresses
✅ FIX 2 - EMAIL: EMAIL_SENT logging on successful send
✅ FIX 2 - EMAIL: EMAIL_FAILED logging on send failure
✅ FIX 2 - EMAIL: Email validation checks for '@' before attempting send
✅ FIX 3 - SELLER CONFIRMATION: create-transaction returns 400 if seller_confirmed=false
✅ FIX 3 - SELLER CONFIRMATION: payment-url endpoint also checks seller_confirmed
✅ FIX 3 - SELLER CONFIRMATION: PAYMENT_BLOCKED logging when blocked
✅ FIX 4 - MONEY PRECISION: calculate_money() uses Decimal with ROUND_HALF_UP
✅ FIX 4 - MONEY PRECISION: All values quantized to 2 decimal places (0.01)
✅ FIX 4 - MONEY PRECISION: seller_receives field in Transaction model
✅ FIX 4 - MONEY PRECISION: Fee breakdown endpoint returns precise values
✅ FIX 4 - MONEY PRECISION: UI displays R 1000.00, R 20.00, R 1020.00 format
✅ FIX 5 - PAYMENT FLOW: Duplicate escrow creation returns already_created status
✅ FIX 5 - PAYMENT FLOW: tradesafe_id check prevents duplicate creation
✅ FIX 6 - USER CLARITY: 'Pending Seller Confirmation' status displayed
✅ FIX 6 - USER CLARITY: 'Ready for Payment' status after seller confirms
✅ FIX 6 - USER CLARITY: Status badge with color coding in ShareTransaction.js
✅ API Health: /api/health returns healthy
✅ Platform Settings: minimum_transaction=500, platform_fee_percent=2
✅ Fee Breakdown: Rejects amounts below R500 minimum

critical_code_review_comments.comment: send_email() has all 4 logging states: EMAIL_ATTEMPT (line 70), EMAIL_SKIPPED (lines 74, 81), EMAIL_SENT (line 99), EMAIL_FAILED (line 103)
Both create_tradesafe_escrow and get_tradesafe_payment_url check seller_confirmed and return 400 if false
calculate_money() uses Decimal with ROUND_HALF_UP and quantize('0.01') for 2 decimal precision
Duplicate escrow check: if transaction.get('tradesafe_id') returns already_created status
getStatusColor() maps clear status values to colors: Pending Seller Confirmation (orange), Ready for Payment (blue), Paid (green), Released (green)

test_credentials: No auth required for share link testing (public endpoint)
seed_data_creation: Used existing transaction TT-083770 for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 critical launch fixes verified: (1) Share link /t/:shareCode works for public access, (2) Email logging has 4 states, (3) Payment blocked without seller confirmation, (4) Money uses Decimal precision with 2 decimals, (5) Duplicate escrow returns already_created, (6) Clear payment_status values displayed. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_launch_fixes.py. Note: Some old transactions may be missing 'created_at' field causing 500 errors on /api/transactions list endpoint.
